title: Colored Lamps
description: Simple mod that adds colored lamps to the game
body:
# Features
- Adds 16 new colors for redstone lamps
- Adds the "**Disco?**" advancements (Obtain all color variants of the redstone lamp)
  
### Color Variants Available

|      |      |      |      |
| ---- | ---- | ---- | ---- |
| White | Orange | Magenta | Light Blue |
| Yellow | Lime | Pink | Gray |
| Light Gray | Cyan | Purple | Blue |
| Brown | Green | Red | Black |

![Advancement](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/F7kiVbTs/images/b9e6e4725d251e4e4eb11748fa620d279eb55e02.png)

![Netherite horse armor at night](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/F7kiVbTs/images/528e4a7d2da7948e89cd0160aecaa701305ab878.png)
![Netherite horse armor in daylight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/F7kiVbTs/images/27a8bed3726ebfaeac9c81dc8f00866af37ad38e.png)
